description: A source system's booking assertion — e.g. SAP 'reported complete 100' with stock reduced and order closed. Distinct from physically produced parts; the claim is itself an entity so the gap between booked and real is first-class. Concrete part-lineage label emitted by the discrepancy-engine (types.ts PartLabel:311-316). Inherits provenance + lineage links from ProductionPart (quantity = claimed amount); adds booked_system + posting_doc (snapshot.ts partObject:90-91).

attributes.name: booked_system
attributes.description: System that made the booking (e.g. sap) — types.ts ProductionPart.booked_system:353

attributes.name: posting_doc
attributes.description: Reference to the posting document / transaction — types.ts ProductionPart.posting_doc:354
